description: Basic component instance with props (§15). `const Badge = <span props={ label, status }>` instantiated as `<Badge label="Inbox" status="open"/>`; the by-value props are substituted into the body interpolation. OQ1 NOTE: whole-tree dom omitted — impl#1 leaks the prop values back as `label=`/`status=`/`data-scrml=` attributes on the root span (binding-anchor convention, impl-private); the anchored author-class assertion is impl-neutral.
rationale: §15.13.2 a non-`bind` prop is captured by value at the call site and read inside the component body; `${label} ${status}` substitutes the two passed strings -> "Inbox open".
